description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Build that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have three jobs: build_msvc on windows-latest, build_macos on macos-latest, and build_linux on ubuntu-22.04 with a matrix strategy for different compilers. Each job checks out the repository, configures and builds the project using cmake, and runs tests with ctest. The build_linux job also uploads code coverage to Codecov when using clang++-14.
